testcase.name: globalVetoableListenersAreRegisteredAndRemoved()

testcase.name: propertySpecificVetoableListenersAreRegisteredAndRemoved()

testcase.name: namedVetoableListenersAreRegisteredWithPropertyNameAndRemoved()
